---
name: Content improvement
about: Suggest improvements to explanations, structure, or learning experience
title: "[Improve] "
labels: documentation, enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 📍 Section

Which file or section are you referring to?

Example:
- `03-Merge-Conflicts/challenges.md`
- `README.md`
- `cheatsheets/beginner-cheatsheet.md`

---

## 🧠 What Needs Improvement?

Describe what feels unclear, confusing, or could be better.

---

## 💡 Suggested Improvement

How would you improve it?

- clearer explanation  
- better example  
- add diagram  
- simplify wording  
- restructure section  

---

## 🎯 Why This Matters

How will this improve learning?

---

## 📷 Optional

Add:
- screenshots  
- diagrams  
- references  

---

## 🧠 Additional Context

Anything else helpful.

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I checked that this issue is not already reported  
- [ ] I clearly explained the problem  
- [ ] I suggested a meaningful improvement
